ex.jp: 荷物の重量を量ってから発送する。
ex.en: We weigh the package before shipping it.

qs.s: この橋は車の＿＿＿＿制限が十トンと定められている。
qs.en: This bridge has a vehicle weight limit set at ten tons.
qs.e: 重量 = weight/heaviness. 容量 = capacity/volume. 数量 = quantity (count). 分量 = amount/portion (e.g. of ingredients).

qs.s: 「重量」の意味は？
qs.e: 重量 is physical weight (重量制限 = weight limit, 重量級 = heavyweight class).

m: up and down; top and bottom; rising and falling

ex.jp: エレベーターが上下に動く。
ex.en: The elevator moves up and down.

qs.s: 株価は一日中、激しく＿＿＿＿を繰り返した。
qs.en: The stock price repeatedly rose and fell sharply all day.
qs.e: 上下 = up and down / rising and falling. 前後 = before and after; around. 左右 = left and right; (also) to influence. 内外 = inside and outside; domestic and foreign.

qs.s: 「上下」の意味は？
o: up and down; top and bottom; rising and falling
qs.e: 上下 covers vertical direction and fluctuation (上下関係 = hierarchy, 上下に揺れる = sway up and down).

m: whereabouts; one's location; (figurative) where things are headed

ex.jp: 事件の後、彼の行方は分からなくなった。
ex.en: After the incident, his whereabouts became unknown.

qs.s: 逃げた猫の＿＿＿＿を、近所中を探し回った。
qs.en: I searched all over the neighborhood for the whereabouts of the escaped cat.
qs.e: 行方(ゆくえ) = whereabouts/where someone or something has gone. 行先(ゆきさき) = destination (where one is headed to). 足跡 = footprints/traces left behind. 道順 = a route/the order of a path.

qs.s: 「行方」の意味は？
o: a route; order of a path
qs.e: 行方 means a person's or thing's current location, often unknown (行方不明 = missing, 行方を追う = track down). Also figurative: 議論の行方 = where the discussion is headed.

ex.jp: この問題は割合に簡単だった。
ex.en: This problem was relatively easy.

qs.s: 年の割には、彼は＿＿＿＿しっかりしている。
qs.en: For his age, he is relatively level-headed.
qs.e: 割合に = relatively/rather (comparatively, often more than expected). めったに = (with neg.) rarely. やむを得ず = unavoidably, having no choice. 思い切り = with all one's might; to one's heart's content.

qs.s: 「割合に」の意味は？
qs.e: 割合に (≒割と/割に) softens a judgment by comparison — 'comparatively, rather' (割合に安い = relatively cheap).

ex.jp: 彼女は来月、医学の学会で発表する。
ex.en: She will present at a medical conference next month.

qs.s: 研究成果を＿＿＿＿で報告し、専門家の意見を聞いた。
qs.en: She reported her findings at the academic conference and heard experts' opinions.
qs.e: 学会 = an academic society / scholarly conference. 学部 = a university faculty/department. 学歴 = one's educational background. 学費 = tuition/school expenses.

qs.s: 「学会」の意味は？
qs.e: 学会 is a scholarly body or its conference where research is presented (学会発表 = conference presentation).

ex.jp: 骨折したので外科で診てもらった。
ex.en: I broke a bone, so I was seen at the surgery department.

qs.s: 傷の手術が必要なので、＿＿＿＿を受診してください。
qs.en: Since the wound needs surgery, please see the surgical department.
qs.e: 外科(げか) = surgery (treats with operations). 内科 = internal medicine (non-surgical). 小児科 = pediatrics. 眼科 = ophthalmology (eyes).

qs.s: 「外科」の意味は？
qs.e: 外科 is the surgical branch of medicine (外科医 = surgeon). Contrast 内科 (internal medicine, treats without operating).

m: real ability; true skill; (one's actual) competence

ex.jp: 彼は実力でその地位を勝ち取った。
ex.en: He earned that position through real ability.

qs.s: 運ではなく、自分の＿＿＿＿で合格したい。
qs.en: I want to pass through my own true ability, not luck.
qs.e: 実力 = real ability/competence (potential skill). 実績 = a proven track record (results already achieved). 勢力 = power/influence of a force. 権力 = (political) power/authority.

qs.s: 「実力」の意味は？
o: a proven track record of results
qs.e: 実力 is genuine ability (実力者 = an influential capable person, 実力を発揮 = show one's true skill). 実績 is the record of what one has actually accomplished.

ex.jp: 来週、中間テストがある。
ex.en: There's a midterm exam next week.

qs.s: 二つの意見の＿＿＿＿をとって、折衷案をまとめた。
qs.en: We took a middle position between the two opinions and put together a compromise.
qs.e: 中間 = the middle/midway point between two things; interim. 中心 = the center/core (focal point). 中央 = the center (central location). 途中 = on the way/midway through a process.

qs.s: 「中間」の意味は？
o: on the way; midway through a process
qs.e: 中間 is the point or stage between two extremes (中間報告 = interim report, 中間地点 = midpoint).

ex.jp: 夜中に怪しい物音が聞こえた。
ex.en: I heard a suspicious noise in the middle of the night.

qs.s: あの店の話は＿＿＿＿ので、契約する前によく調べたほうがいい。
qs.en: That shop's story is dubious, so you'd better investigate well before signing.
qs.e: 怪しい = suspicious/dubious/doubtful. 正しい = correct/right. 親しい = close/intimate (friendly). 等しい = equal/identical.

qs.s: 「怪しい」の意味は？
qs.e: 怪しい marks something untrustworthy or uncertain (怪しい人物 = a suspicious person, 雲行きが怪しい = the situation looks doubtful).

m: in this way; thus; and so

ex.jp: こうして二人は結婚し、幸せに暮らした。
ex.en: And so the two married and lived happily.

qs.s: 努力を重ねた結果、＿＿＿＿彼は夢を実現させた。
qs.en: As a result of his repeated efforts, thus he realized his dream.
qs.e: こうして = in this way/thus (summarizing how a result came about). それでも = even so/nevertheless. たとえば = for example. ところが = however/but (unexpected turn).

qs.s: 「こうして」の意味は？
o: in this way; thus; and so
qs.e: こうして connects a process to its outcome — 'in this manner / and so' (こうして〜することになった = and thus it came to be).

ex.jp: よく噛むと消化がよくなる。
ex.en: Chewing well improves digestion.

qs.s: 脂っこい食事は＿＿＿＿に時間がかかり、胃に負担をかける。
qs.en: Greasy meals take time to digest and burden the stomach.
qs.e: 消化 = digestion (breaking down food in the body); figuratively, absorbing knowledge or clearing tasks. 吸収 = absorption (taking in). 分解 = breaking apart/decomposition. 排出 = discharge/excretion (putting out).

qs.s: 「消化」の意味は？
qs.e: 消化 is digesting food (消化不良 = indigestion) and figuratively processing/getting through things (スケジュールを消化する = work through a schedule).

ex.jp: 本をジャンルごとに分類した。
ex.en: I classified the books by genre.

qs.s: 集めたデータを、いくつかのグループに＿＿＿＿する。
qs.en: We classify the collected data into several groups.
qs.e: 分類 = sorting things into categories/types. 分解 = taking apart/decomposing. 分析 = analysis (examining components in detail). 区別 = distinguishing/telling apart (drawing a line between).

qs.s: 「分類」の意味は？
qs.e: 分類 groups items by shared traits (分類表 = classification table). 区別 just distinguishes two things; 分析 breaks something down to study it.

ex.jp: 店の前に大きな看板が立っている。
ex.en: A large signboard stands in front of the shop.

qs.s: その俳優は劇団の＿＿＿＿として観客を集めている。
qs.en: That actor draws audiences as the theater troupe's star attraction.
qs.e: 看板 = a signboard; figuratively the public face or main draw. 表札 = a nameplate (on a house). 標識 = a (road/traffic) sign/marker. 見本 = a sample/specimen.

qs.s: 「看板」の意味は？
o: signboard; sign; public face / main draw
qs.e: 看板 is a shop sign (看板を出す = put out a sign) and figuratively the star draw (看板娘 = the popular girl who draws customers, 看板商品 = flagship product).

ex.jp: 運転を交代しながら長距離を走った。
ex.en: We drove a long distance, taking turns at the wheel.

qs.s: 夜勤の看護師が朝、日勤の人と＿＿＿＿する。
qs.en: The night-shift nurse hands over to the day-shift person in the morning.
qs.e: 交代 = taking turns / changing shifts / substituting. 交流 = interaction/exchange between people. 交換 = swapping concrete things. 交差 = crossing/intersecting.

qs.s: 「交代」の意味は？
qs.e: 交代 means one person/thing replacing another in turn (交代制 = shift system, 選手交代 = player substitution). Also written 交替.

ex.jp: 川で身元不明の死体が見つかった。
ex.en: An unidentified body was found in the river.

qs.s: 警察は現場で発見された＿＿＿＿の身元を調べている。
qs.en: The police are investigating the identity of the body found at the scene.
qs.e: 死体 = corpse/dead body (clinical/blunt, used in crime contexts). 遺体 = the (deceased person's) remains (respectful term). 死亡 = death/decease (the event/fact). 葬式 = a funeral.

qs.s: 「死体」の意味は？
qs.e: 死体 is a blunt term for a dead body, common in crime/forensic contexts (死体遺棄 = disposal of a body). For respect toward the deceased, use 遺体.

m: at least; if nothing else; at the very least (a modest wish)

ex.jp: せめて一言、お礼を言いたかった。
ex.en: I wanted to at least say a word of thanks.

qs.s: 全部は無理でも、＿＿＿＿半分だけでも終わらせたい。
qs.en: Even if not all of it, I'd like to finish at least half.
qs.e: せめて = at least (expressing a minimum hope/wish). どうせ = anyway/in any case (resigned). まさか = surely not/no way. せいぜい = at most/at best (upper limit).

qs.s: 「せめて」の意味は？
o: at least; if nothing else (a modest wish)
qs.e: せめて expresses settling for a minimum amount as a wish (せめて〜だけでも = at least just ~). It conveys longing for a bare-minimum outcome.

m: if that's the case; in that case; then

ex.jp: 疲れたの？それなら少し休もう。
ex.en: You're tired? In that case, let's rest a bit.

qs.s: 予算が足りないんですね。＿＿＿＿、計画を見直しましょう。
qs.en: So the budget is short. In that case, let's review the plan.
qs.e: それなら = if that's the case/then (drawing a conclusion from what was said). それとも = or (else) (choosing between options). それなのに = and yet/despite that. The fourth is a closing phrase, not a connector here.

qs.s: 「それなら」の意味は？
o: if that's the case; in that case; then
qs.e: それなら takes the other person's statement as a premise and responds accordingly ('if so, then...'). ≒ だったら/では.

ex.jp: 入国の手続きには時間がかかった。
ex.en: The immigration procedures took time.

qs.s: 口座を開くための＿＿＿＿は、窓口で行えます。
qs.en: The procedure to open an account can be done at the counter.
qs.e: 手続き = formal procedures/formalities (often paperwork). 手間 = trouble/labor/effort required. 手順 = the order of steps/sequence to do something. 手当 = an allowance/benefit; (also) medical treatment.

qs.s: 「手続き」の意味は？
qs.e: 手続き refers to the formal steps required to accomplish something official (手続きを踏む = follow due procedure, 手続きが面倒 = the paperwork is a hassle). 手順 is the order of steps in a task.

m: date and time (of a scheduled event)

ex.jp: 会議の日時はまだ決まっていない。
ex.en: The date and time of the meeting hasn't been decided yet.

qs.s: 試験の＿＿＿＿と場所を、受験票で必ず確認してください。
qs.en: Be sure to check the exam's date/time and location on your admission ticket.
qs.e: 日時 = the specific date and time of an event. 日程 = a schedule/itinerary (the program of days). 期日 = a due date/appointed day. 時刻 = a precise point in time/clock time.

qs.s: 「日時」の意味は？
o: date and time of a scheduled event
qs.e: 日時 combines the day and the clock time of an event (開催日時 = date and time of an event). 日程 is the fuller schedule of activities.

m: reflection; reflecting (an opinion, condition) in something

ex.jp: アンケートの結果を商品開発に反映する。
ex.en: We reflect the survey results in product development.

qs.s: 作品には作者の人生観が色濃く＿＿＿＿されている。
qs.en: The author's outlook on life is strongly reflected in the work.
qs.e: 反映 = reflecting/mirroring (one thing showing up in another). 反省 = reflection/self-examination (regret). 反応 = a reaction/response. 反対 = opposition/being against.

qs.s: 「反映」の意味は？
qs.e: 反映 means one thing being mirrored or incorporated in another (意見を反映する = reflect opinions, 世相を反映 = reflect the times).

ex.jp: 専門用語が多くて、説明が理解できなかった。
ex.en: There were so many technical terms that I couldn't understand the explanation.

qs.s: 法律の＿＿＿＿は難しいので、注釈が付いている。
qs.en: Legal terminology is difficult, so notes are attached.
qs.e: 用語 = a (specialized) term/terminology of a field. 単語 = a word (vocabulary item). 言語 = language (a system). 語学 = language study/learning.

qs.s: 「用語」の意味は？
o: a term; terminology of a field
qs.e: 用語 refers to the specialized terms used in a particular domain (専門用語 = technical terms, 用語集 = glossary). 単語 is just any word.

ex.jp: 今月の売上は先月を上回った。
ex.en: This month's sales exceeded last month's.

qs.s: 新商品のおかげで、店の＿＿＿＿が大きく伸びた。
qs.en: Thanks to the new product, the store's sales grew significantly.
qs.e: 売上 = total sales/revenue (money taken in). 利益 = profit (revenue minus costs). 費用 = expenses/costs. 価格 = the price (of an item).

qs.s: 「売上」の意味は？
qs.e: 売上(げ) is gross sales/revenue (売上高 = sales figures). Distinct from 利益 (profit, what's left after expenses).

ex.jp: この城は中世に建てられた。
ex.en: This castle was built in the Middle Ages.

qs.s: ヨーロッパの＿＿＿＿には、多くの大聖堂が造られた。
qs.en: In the European Middle Ages, many cathedrals were built.
qs.e: 中世 = the Middle Ages/medieval era. 近代 = the modern era (recent centuries). 古代 = ancient times. 現代 = the present day/contemporary era.

qs.s: 「中世」の意味は？
qs.e: 中世 is the historical medieval period, between 古代 (ancient) and 近代 (modern).

m: self-reflection; reconsideration; regret over one's conduct

ex.jp: 今日の失敗を反省して、明日に生かそう。
ex.en: Let's reflect on today's failure and make use of it tomorrow.

qs.s: 彼は自分の態度を深く＿＿＿＿し、皆に謝った。
qs.en: He reflected deeply on his attitude and apologized to everyone.
qs.e: 反省 = looking back critically on one's own conduct (to improve). 反映 = reflecting one thing in another. 後悔 = regret (wishing one hadn't). 回想 = reminiscence/recollection (looking back fondly/neutrally).

qs.s: 「反省」の意味は？
qs.e: 反省 means examining your own actions self-critically to do better (反省会 = a review/post-mortem meeting). 後悔 is mere regret without the corrective intent.

ex.jp: 彼は授業中にこっそりお菓子を食べた。
ex.en: He secretly ate snacks during class.

qs.s: 驚かせようと、誕生日プレゼントを＿＿＿＿用意した。
qs.en: To surprise her, I secretly prepared a birthday present.
qs.e: こっそり = secretly/stealthily (so others don't notice). はっきり = clearly/distinctly. うっかり = carelessly/absent-mindedly. のんびり = leisurely/relaxed.

qs.s: 「こっそり」の意味は？
qs.e: こっそり describes doing something quietly so as not to be noticed (こっそり抜け出す = slip out unnoticed).

m: at once; right away; promptly (acting without delay)

ex.jp: 届いた本を早速読み始めた。
ex.en: I started reading the book that arrived right away.

qs.s: ご連絡ありがとうございます。＿＿＿＿ですが、本題に入ります。
qs.en: Thank you for contacting me. Without delay, let me get to the main point.
qs.e: 早速 = promptly/right away (taking action without delay). ようやく = finally/at last (after a long wait). 次第に = gradually. いまだに = still (even now), used for things that ought to have changed.

qs.s: 「早速」の意味は？
qs.e: 早速 means acting immediately upon something (早速とりかかる = get started right away). Often a polite lead-in to getting to business.

m: advanced level; senior grade; upper class (level)

ex.jp: 彼女は上級の日本語クラスに進んだ。
ex.en: She advanced to the upper-level Japanese class.

qs.s: 基礎を終えたら、＿＿＿＿コースで応用力を鍛える。
qs.en: After finishing the basics, you build applied skills in the advanced course.
qs.e: 上級 = advanced/senior level (in skill or rank). 初級 = beginner level. 中級 = intermediate level. 高級 = luxury/high-class (in quality/price, not skill rank).

qs.s: 「上級」の意味は？
qs.e: 上級 is the higher tier in a graded sequence (上級者 = advanced learner, 上級職 = senior post). Don't confuse with 高級 (luxury/expensive).

ex.jp: 機械で部屋の温度を測定する。
ex.en: We measure the room temperature with a device.

qs.s: 専用の機器で、騒音のレベルを正確に＿＿＿＿した。
qs.en: We accurately measured the noise level with dedicated equipment.
qs.e: 測定 = measuring a quantity with instruments. 計算 = calculation/computing numbers. 観察 = observation (watching closely). 判定 = judgment/ruling (deciding a result).

qs.s: 「測定」の意味は？
qs.e: 測定 is taking a precise measurement (測定器 = measuring instrument, 体力測定 = fitness measurement). The verb 計る/測る underlies it.

ex.jp: 商品についての問い合わせが多い。
ex.en: There are many inquiries about the product.

qs.s: 詳しいことは、下記の窓口まで＿＿＿＿ください。
qs.en: For details, please direct your inquiry to the desk below.
qs.e: 問い合わせ = an inquiry/asking for information. お知らせ = a notice/announcement (informing). お断り = a refusal/declining. お見舞い = a get-well visit/sympathy gift.

qs.s: 「問い合わせ」の意味は？
qs.e: 問い合わせ is asking a question to obtain information (問い合わせ先 = contact/inquiry desk, 在庫の問い合わせ = a stock inquiry).

ex.jp: その湖の水は透明で底まで見える。
ex.en: That lake's water is so clear you can see to the bottom.

qs.s: このガラスは＿＿＿＿なので、向こう側がよく見える。
qs.en: This glass is transparent, so you can see clearly to the other side.
qs.e: 透明 = transparent/see-through. 清潔 = clean/hygienic. 鮮明 = vivid/sharp (clear image). 公正 = fair/impartial (just). Note: 透明 is also used figuratively for openness (透明性 = transparency in governance).

qs.s: 「透明」の意味は？
qs.e: 透明 means see-through (透明なガラス = clear glass) and figuratively openness (透明性 = transparency, accountability).

ex.jp: 夏になると、川辺で花火が打ち上げられる。
ex.en: In summer, fireworks are set off by the riverside.

qs.s: 夜空に大輪の＿＿＿＿が次々と上がった。
qs.en: Large fireworks went up one after another into the night sky.
qs.e: 花火 = fireworks. 花束 = a bouquet of flowers. 花壇 = a flower bed. 火災 = a fire (disaster).

qs.s: 「花火」の意味は？
qs.e: 花火 means fireworks (花火大会 = fireworks festival, 線香花火 = sparklers).

ex.jp: 在庫は近くの倉庫に保管されている。
ex.en: The stock is kept in a nearby warehouse.

qs.s: 季節外れの商品は、いったん＿＿＿＿にしまっておく。
qs.en: Out-of-season goods are put away in the warehouse for now.
qs.e: 倉庫 = a warehouse/storehouse (for goods). 車庫 = a garage (for vehicles). 金庫 = a safe/vault (for money/valuables). 書庫 = a book storage room/stacks.

qs.s: 「倉庫」の意味は？
qs.e: 倉庫 is a building for storing goods (倉庫業 = warehousing, 物流倉庫 = distribution warehouse).

m: way of thinking; idea; conception; approach

ex.jp: 彼の発想はいつもユニークだ。
ex.en: His ideas are always unique.

qs.s: 従来の枠にとらわれない、柔軟な＿＿＿＿が求められる。
qs.en: A flexible way of thinking, unbound by conventional frameworks, is needed.
qs.e: 発想 = a way of thinking/conceiving ideas (the mental approach). 発見 = discovery (finding something). 発展 = development/growth. 発生 = occurrence/outbreak.

qs.s: 「発想」の意味は？
o: way of thinking; idea; conception; approach
qs.e: 発想 is how one conceives ideas — one's mindset or approach (発想の転換 = a shift in thinking, 自由な発想 = free-form ideas). ≒ 考え方.

ex.jp: 赤ん坊が大きな瞳でこちらを見つめた。
ex.en: The baby gazed at us with big eyes.

qs.s: 彼女の澄んだ＿＿＿＿に吸い込まれそうになった。
qs.en: I felt almost drawn into her clear eyes.
qs.e: 瞳 = the pupil/the eyes (often poetic). 眉(まゆ) = eyebrow. 頬(ほお) = cheek. 額(ひたい) = forehead.

qs.s: 「瞳」の意味は？
o: pupil of the eye; the eyes (poetic)
qs.e: 瞳 literally is the pupil but is often used poetically for the eyes (黒い瞳 = dark eyes, 瞳を閉じる = close one's eyes).

ex.jp: 乾燥で皮膚がかさかさになった。
ex.en: My skin got rough from the dryness.

qs.s: 紫外線は＿＿＿＿に大きなダメージを与える。
qs.en: Ultraviolet rays cause major damage to the skin.
qs.e: 皮膚 = skin (the body's outer covering). 筋肉 = muscle. 骨格 = skeleton/bone structure. 内臓 = internal organs.

qs.s: 「皮膚」の意味は？
qs.e: 皮膚 is the medical/general word for skin (皮膚科 = dermatology, 皮膚病 = skin disease). 肌(はだ) is the everyday word emphasizing texture/appearance.

m: application; putting to practical use; applying (knowledge)

ex.jp: 習った理論を実生活に応用する。
ex.en: I apply the theory I learned to real life.

qs.s: 基礎を理解していれば、＿＿＿＿問題も解けるはずだ。
qs.en: If you understand the basics, you should be able to solve applied problems too.
qs.e: 応用 = applying knowledge in practice (building on the basics). 基礎 = the fundamentals (the opposite end). 原理 = an underlying principle. 実験 = an experiment.

qs.s: 「応用」の意味は？
o: application; putting knowledge to practical use
qs.e: 応用 means taking basic knowledge and applying it (応用力 = ability to apply, 応用問題 = applied/word problems). Its counterpart is 基礎 (the basics).

m: the front; the facade; directly opposite

ex.jp: 建物の正面に大きな時計がある。
ex.en: There's a large clock on the front of the building.

qs.s: 問題から逃げず、＿＿＿＿から向き合うべきだ。
qs.en: You should face the problem head-on rather than running from it.
qs.e: 正面 = the front/facing side; head-on. 側面 = the side/a side aspect. 背面 = the back/rear side. 裏面 = the reverse/back surface (of paper, a coin).

qs.s: 「正面」の意味は？
o: the front; the facade; directly opposite
qs.e: 正面 is the front-facing side (正面玄関 = main entrance, 正面から = head-on/directly). 正面衝突 = a head-on collision.

ex.jp: この器は職人が一つ一つ手作りしている。
ex.en: These vessels are handmade one by one by craftsmen.

qs.s: 長年修行を積んだ＿＿＿＿の技は見事だ。
qs.en: The skill of the artisan who trained for many years is magnificent.
qs.e: 職人 = a skilled craftsman/artisan. 素人(しろうと) = an amateur/layperson. 商人(しょうにん) = a merchant/trader. 職員 = a staff member/employee (of an institution).

qs.s: 「職人」の意味は？
qs.e: 職人 is a skilled manual craftsperson (職人技 = artisan's skill, 寿司職人 = sushi chef). Opposite of 素人 (amateur).

m: taking apart; disassembly; decomposition; breaking down

ex.jp: 時計を分解して、中の仕組みを調べた。
ex.en: I took the watch apart to examine the mechanism inside.

qs.s: 微生物が有機物を＿＿＿＿し、土に返す。
qs.en: Microorganisms decompose organic matter and return it to the soil.
qs.e: 分解 = taking apart / breaking down into components (physical or chemical). 分類 = sorting into categories. 分割 = dividing into portions/installments. 分布 = distribution (how things are spread out).

qs.s: 「分解」の意味は？
qs.e: 分解 means breaking something into its parts (分解掃除 = take apart and clean) or chemical breakdown (分解する = decompose). The verb is 分解する.

ex.jp: 物が落ちるのは重力の法則による。
ex.en: Objects fall due to the law of gravity.

qs.s: 市場には需要と供給の＿＿＿＿が働いている。
qs.en: The law of supply and demand operates in the market.
qs.e: 法則 = a (natural/scientific) law or invariable rule. 規則 = a rule/regulation (set by people). 法律 = a (legal) law/statute. 原則 = a principle (general rule, with possible exceptions).

qs.s: 「法則」の意味は？
o: a rule; regulation set by people
qs.e: 法則 is an invariable law, often of nature or logic (万有引力の法則 = law of universal gravitation, 一定の法則 = a fixed pattern). 規則/法律 are human-made rules.

ex.jp: 住民が公民館で集会を開いた。
ex.en: The residents held a meeting at the community center.

qs.s: 反対派は広場で大規模な抗議＿＿＿＿を行った。
qs.en: The opposition held a large-scale protest rally in the plaza.
qs.e: 集会 = an organized assembly/gathering (often political/social). 集合 = meeting up at a set place/time. 集中 = concentration/focusing. 集団 = a group/crowd (the body of people itself).

qs.s: 「集会」の意味は？
o: meeting up at a set place/time
qs.e: 集会 is a gathering held for a purpose (集会の自由 = freedom of assembly, 抗議集会 = protest rally). 集合 just means converging at a meeting point.

ex.jp: この地域は古くから商業が盛んだ。
ex.en: Commerce has flourished in this area since long ago.

qs.s: 駅前は大型店が並ぶ＿＿＿＿地区になっている。
qs.en: The area in front of the station has become a commercial district lined with big stores.
qs.e: 商業 = commerce/trade (buying and selling). 工業 = (manufacturing) industry. 農業 = agriculture. 産業 = industry in the broad sense (all economic sectors).

qs.s: 「商業」の意味は？
qs.e: 商業 refers to commerce and trade (商業施設 = commercial facility, 商業的 = commercial). 産業 is the umbrella term covering all industries.

ex.jp: 事故から三日後、生存者が発見された。
ex.en: Three days after the accident, a survivor was found.

qs.s: 厳しい環境の中で、その生物は懸命に＿＿＿＿している。
qs.en: In the harsh environment, that creature survives desperately.
qs.e: 生存 = survival/staying alive (continuing to exist). 生産 = production/manufacturing. 生活 = daily life/living (lifestyle). 誕生 = birth/coming into being.

qs.s: 「生存」の意味は？
qs.e: 生存 is the fact of remaining alive (生存者 = survivor, 生存競争 = struggle for survival).

ex.jp: 台風が日本に接近している。
ex.en: A typhoon is approaching Japan.

qs.s: 二つの船が危険なほど＿＿＿＿し、衝突しかけた。
qs.en: The two ships drew dangerously close and nearly collided.
qs.e: 接近 = approaching/drawing near (closing distance). 接触 = contact/touching (physical, or making contact). 接続 = connection/joining (devices, lines). 密接 = close/intimate (a tight relationship). 密接 is an adjective-ish 'closely related'.

qs.s: 「接近」の意味は？
qs.e: 接近 means narrowing the distance to something (接近戦 = close combat, 急接近 = rapidly getting closer).

ex.jp: 旅行の日程を立てるのは楽しい。
ex.en: Planning a trip's itinerary is fun.

qs.s: 会議が延びて、その後の＿＿＿＿が全部ずれてしまった。
qs.en: The meeting ran long, and the whole subsequent schedule got pushed back.
qs.e: 日程 = a schedule/itinerary laid out over days. 予定 = a plan/what's scheduled (broad). 期間 = a span/duration of time. 行程 = the distance/route of a journey (or its stages). 日程 and 予定 overlap, but 日程 stresses the day-by-day program.

qs.s: 「日程」の意味は？
qs.e: 日程 is the arranged schedule of events over days (日程調整 = arranging schedules, 過密日程 = a packed schedule).

ex.jp: 来月、隣町に引っ越しする予定だ。
ex.en: I plan to move to the next town over next month.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿の荷造りが終わらず、夜遅くまでかかった。
qs.en: The packing for the move wasn't done, so it took until late at night.
qs.e: 引っ越し = moving house/relocating residence. 片付け = tidying up/putting away. 掃除 = cleaning. 旅行 = travel/a trip.

qs.s: 「引っ越し」の意味は？
qs.e: 引っ越し means changing where you live (引っ越し業者 = moving company, 引っ越し祝い = housewarming gift). The verb is 引っ越す.

ex.jp: この道具は用途が広い。
ex.en: This tool has a wide range of uses.

qs.s: その部屋は会議や研修など、様々な＿＿＿＿に使える。
qs.en: That room can be used for various purposes such as meetings and training.
qs.e: 用途 = the use/purpose something serves. 用事 = an errand/something to attend to. 用意 = preparation/getting ready. 費用 = expenses/cost.

qs.s: 「用途」の意味は？
o: use; purpose; application of an item
an errand; business to attend to
qs.e: 用途 refers to what something is used for (用途に応じて = depending on the use, 多用途 = multipurpose).

ex.jp: 過剰な期待は失望につながる。
ex.en: Excessive expectations lead to disappointment.

qs.s: 商品を作りすぎて、在庫が＿＿＿＿になっている。
qs.en: We made too many products, and inventory is in surplus.
qs.e: 過剰 = excessive/in surplus (too much). 不足 = shortage/lack (the opposite). 適度 = moderate/just the right amount. 十分 = sufficient/enough.

qs.s: 「過剰」の意味は？
qs.e: 過剰 means more than necessary (過剰反応 = overreaction, 供給過剰 = oversupply). Opposite of 不足 (shortage).

m: going to work; attendance at work

ex.jp: 明日は休日だが、出勤しなければならない。
ex.en: Tomorrow is a holiday, but I have to go to work.

qs.s: 電車の遅延で、＿＿＿＿時間に遅れてしまった。
qs.en: Due to the train delay, I was late for my start-of-work time.
qs.e: 出勤 = going to / showing up for work (on a given day). 退勤 = leaving work for the day. 欠勤 = being absent from work. 通勤 = commuting (the journey to work).

qs.s: 「出勤」の意味は？
o: going to / showing up for work
qs.e: 出勤 means reporting to work on a given day (出勤日 = workday, 出勤簿 = attendance record). 通勤 is the act of commuting; 出勤 is showing up.

ex.jp: この通りには昔ながらの商店が並んでいる。
ex.en: Old-style shops line this street.

qs.s: 駅前の＿＿＿＿街は、夕方になると買い物客でにぎわう。
qs.en: The shopping street in front of the station bustles with shoppers in the evening.
qs.e: 商店 = a shop/retail store. 商品 = merchandise/goods. 商社 = a trading company (large-scale trade). 商人 = a merchant (the person).

qs.s: 「商店」の意味は？
qs.e: 商店 is a retail shop (商店街 = shopping district/arcade). 商品 is the goods sold; 商人 is the seller.

ex.jp: この物質は燃えやすい性質を持つ。
ex.en: This substance has the property of being flammable.

qs.s: 彼は穏やかな＿＿＿＿で、めったに怒らない。
qs.en: He has a calm disposition and rarely gets angry.
qs.e: 性質 = inherent nature/property (of a thing or person). 性格 = personality/character (of a person specifically). 体質 = bodily constitution/predisposition. 品質 = quality (of goods).

qs.s: 「性質」の意味は？
qs.e: 性質 is the inherent nature of something or someone (水の性質 = properties of water; おとなしい性質 = a gentle disposition). For a person's personality specifically, 性格 is more common.

m: joining a company; entering a firm (as an employee)

ex.jp: 彼は今年の春、この会社に入社した。
ex.en: He joined this company this spring.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿して三年、ようやく仕事に慣れてきた。
qs.en: Three years after joining the company, I've finally gotten used to the work.
qs.e: 入社 = joining a (specific) company. 退社 = leaving a company / leaving the office for the day. 入学 = entering a school. 就職 = finding employment / getting a job (general).

qs.s: 「入社」の意味は？
o: joining a company as an employee
qs.e: 入社 specifically means joining a company (入社式 = company entrance ceremony, 新入社員 = new hire). 就職 is the broader act of becoming employed.

m: plaza; open square; public open space

ex.jp: 駅前の広場で待ち合わせよう。
ex.en: Let's meet up at the plaza in front of the station.

qs.s: イベントの日、＿＿＿＿には大勢の人が集まった。
qs.en: On the day of the event, a large crowd gathered in the plaza.
qs.e: 広場 = an open public square/plaza. 会場 = a venue (for a specific event). 売場(売り場) = a sales floor/department in a store. 現場 = the actual site/scene (of work or an incident).

qs.s: 「広場」の意味は？
o: plaza; open square; public open space
a sales floor in a store
qs.e: 広場 is an open public space where people gather (駅前広場 = station plaza, 中央広場 = central square).

ex.jp: このルールに例外はない。
ex.en: There are no exceptions to this rule.

qs.s: 原則は全員参加だが、病気の場合は＿＿＿＿として認める。
qs.en: In principle everyone participates, but illness is admitted as an exception.
qs.e: 例外 = an exception (a case outside the rule). 例文 = an example sentence. 実例 = a concrete/actual example. 前例 = a precedent (a prior case).

qs.s: 「例外」の意味は？
qs.e: 例外 is a case that falls outside the general rule (例外なく = without exception, 例外的に = exceptionally).

m: once; for a moment; temporarily; once (something happens)

ex.jp: 一旦家に帰ってから、また出かけた。
ex.en: I went home once and then went out again.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿決めたことは、最後までやり通すべきだ。
qs.en: Once you've decided something, you should see it through to the end.
qs.e: 一旦 = once / for the time being (一旦〜たら = once ~ happens). いつも = always. 次第 = depending on / as soon as. 当然 = naturally/of course.

qs.s: 「一旦」の意味は？
o: once; for a moment; temporarily; once (something happens)
qs.e: 一旦 means doing something once or temporarily (一旦停止 = a momentary stop, 一旦中止 = suspend for now), or 'once' a condition is met (一旦始めたら = once you start).

m: relocation; moving (of an office, address); transfer

ex.jp: 本社は来年、郊外に移転する。
ex.en: The head office will relocate to the suburbs next year.

qs.s: 事務所の＿＿＿＿に伴い、住所と電話番号が変わります。
qs.en: With the office relocation, the address and phone number will change.
qs.e: 移転 = relocating an office/base/address (a formal, often permanent move). 移動 = moving from place to place (general motion). 変更 = a change/alteration. 引退 = retirement (from a career/activity).

qs.s: 「移転」の意味は？
o: relocation of an office or address; transfer
qs.e: 移転 is relocating a fixed base such as an office or registered address (本社移転 = headquarters relocation, 移転先 = the new location).

ex.jp: 彼女は地味な服を好んで着る。
ex.en: She prefers to wear plain clothes.

qs.s: 目立たないが、彼の仕事は＿＿＿＿だが確実だ。
qs.en: It doesn't stand out, but his work is plain yet dependable.
qs.e: 地味 = plain/subdued/understated (not flashy). 派手 = showy/flashy (the opposite). 豪華 = gorgeous/lavish. 贅沢 = luxurious/extravagant.

qs.s: 「地味」の意味は？
qs.e: 地味 describes something modest and unshowy (地味な色 = a subdued color, 地味な作業 = unglamorous work). Opposite of 派手 (flashy).

ex.jp: 総理大臣が記者会見を行った。
ex.en: The Prime Minister held a press conference.

qs.s: 選挙の結果、新しい＿＿＿＿が選ばれた。
qs.en: As a result of the election, a new Prime Minister was chosen.
qs.e: 総理大臣 = Prime Minister (head of Japan's government; short form 首相). 国会議員 = a Diet member (legislator). 裁判官 = a judge. 大統領 = a president (of a republic).

qs.s: 「総理大臣」の意味は？
qs.e: 総理大臣 (内閣総理大臣) is Japan's Prime Minister, also called 首相. Distinct from 大統領 (president).

ex.jp: 念のため、予備の電池を持っていく。
ex.en: Just in case, I'll take spare batteries.

qs.s: 停電に備えて、＿＿＿＿の電源を用意してある。
qs.en: In case of a power outage, a backup power source is prepared.
qs.e: 予備 = a spare/reserve/backup (extra kept in readiness). 予約 = a reservation/booking. 予測 = a prediction/forecast. 準備 = preparation (the act of getting ready).

qs.s: 「予備」の意味は？
qs.e: 予備 means a spare kept in reserve (予備校 = prep school, 予備知識 = background knowledge, 予備のかぎ = a spare key).

ex.jp: 休日は映画鑑賞を楽しんでいる。
ex.en: On days off, I enjoy watching movies.

qs.s: 美術館で名画を＿＿＿＿し、心が豊かになった。
qs.en: I appreciated the masterpieces at the museum and felt enriched.
qs.e: 鑑賞 = appreciating/savoring art or beauty (with aesthetic understanding). 観察 = observation (watching closely to study). 見物 = sightseeing/watching as a spectacle. 検査 = inspection/examination/testing.

qs.s: 「鑑賞」の意味は？
o: appreciation of art; enjoying a work aesthetically
qs.e: 鑑賞 means appreciating art with understanding (音楽鑑賞 = listening to music, 鑑賞会 = a viewing/appreciation event). 観察 is analytical watching.

ex.jp: 冬は空気が乾燥して喉が痛くなる。
ex.en: In winter the air gets dry and my throat hurts.

qs.s: 洗濯物を＿＿＿＿させるため、乾燥機を使った。
qs.en: To dry the laundry, I used a dryer.
qs.e: 乾燥 = drying/dryness (loss of moisture). 湿気(しっけ) = humidity/dampness (the opposite). 蒸発 = evaporation. 凍結 = freezing over.

qs.s: 「乾燥」の意味は？
qs.e: 乾燥 means becoming dry/lacking moisture (乾燥肌 = dry skin, 乾燥機 = a dryer). Opposite of 湿気 (dampness).

ex.jp: 家賃は月末までに払う。
ex.en: I pay the rent by the end of the month.

qs.s: 請求書の支払い期限は、毎月＿＿＿＿となっている。
qs.en: The payment deadline for invoices is the end of each month.
qs.e: 月末 = end of the month. 月初(げっしょ) = beginning of the month. 年末 = end of the year. 週末 = weekend.

qs.s: 「月末」の意味は？
qs.e: 月末 means the last days of the month (月末締め = month-end closing). Opposite of 月初 (start of month).

m: point; spot; location (a point on a map or route)

ex.jp: マラソンの折り返し地点に着いた。
ex.en: I reached the turnaround point of the marathon.

qs.s: スタート＿＿＿＿から五キロ走ったところで給水する。
qs.en: You take water five kilometers from the starting point.
qs.e: 地点 = a specific point/spot (on a map or route). 地域 = a region/area (a broad zone). 地区 = a district/section (a designated area). 現地 = the actual site/local place.

qs.s: 「地点」の意味は？
o: a specific point or spot on a map/route
qs.e: 地点 pinpoints a precise location (通過地点 = a waypoint, 現在地点 = current point). 地域/地区 refer to areas, not single points.

m: to aim at; to target; to set one's sights on

ex.jp: 彼は世界記録を狙っている。
ex.en: He is setting his sights on the world record.

qs.s: 敵の弱点を＿＿＿＿、一気に攻め込んだ。
qs.en: Targeting the enemy's weak point, they attacked all at once.
qs.e: 狙う = to aim at/target. 祈る = to pray. 誇る = to be proud of/boast. 補う = to make up for/supplement.

qs.s: 「狙う」の意味は？
o: to aim at; to target; to set one's sights on
to be proud of; to boast
to make up for; to supplement
qs.e: 狙う means to aim for or target something (優勝を狙う = aim for victory, 命を狙う = make an attempt on someone's life). The noun is 狙い (aim).

m: area; surface area (size of a region)

ex.jp: この公園の面積は東京ドーム三個分だ。
ex.en: This park's area is about three Tokyo Domes.

qs.s: その国は人口は多いが、国土の＿＿＿＿は意外と小さい。
qs.en: That country has a large population, but its land area is surprisingly small.
qs.e: 面積 = area (2D surface size). 体積 = volume (3D space occupied). 容積 = capacity/cubic content (how much it holds). 距離 = distance (length between points).

qs.s: 「面積」の意味は？
qs.e: 面積 measures two-dimensional area (土地の面積 = land area, 表面積 = surface area). 体積 is volume.

ex.jp: 申込書に性別を記入する。
ex.en: You fill in your gender on the application form.

qs.s: この仕事は＿＿＿＿に関係なく、誰でも応募できる。
qs.en: Anyone can apply for this job regardless of gender.
qs.e: 性別 = sex/gender (male/female distinction). 年齢 = age. 国籍 = nationality. 職業 = occupation/profession.

qs.s: 「性別」の意味は？
qs.e: 性別 refers to the distinction of sex/gender (性別欄 = gender field, 性別を問わず = regardless of gender).

m: to be connected; to be linked; to lead to

ex.jp: この道は駅まで繋がっている。
ex.en: This road connects to the station.

qs.s: 日々の小さな努力が、大きな成果に＿＿＿＿。
qs.en: Small daily efforts lead to big results.
qs.e: 繋がる = to be connected / to lead to. 広がる = to spread/widen. 重なる = to overlap/pile up/coincide. 当たる = to hit; to be correct; to be assigned.

qs.s: 「繋がる」の意味は？
o: to be connected; to be linked; to lead to
to overlap; to pile up; to coincide
qs.e: 繋がる means to be joined or to result in (電話が繋がる = the call connects, 努力が成功に繋がる = effort leads to success). The noun is 繋がり.

ex.jp: 車は信号が青になると加速した。
ex.en: The car accelerated when the light turned green.

qs.s: 少子化が＿＿＿＿し、労働力の不足が深刻になっている。
qs.en: The declining birthrate is accelerating, and the labor shortage is becoming serious.
qs.e: 加速 = acceleration/speeding up (figuratively, a trend intensifying). 減速 = deceleration/slowing down (the opposite). 停止 = stopping/halting. 逆転 = reversal/turning the tables.

qs.s: 「加速」の意味は？
qs.e: 加速 means increasing speed or pace (加速度 = acceleration rate, 加速する = pick up speed / intensify). Opposite of 減速.

ex.jp: 水は水素と酸素からできている。
ex.en: Water is made of hydrogen and oxygen.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿を燃料に使う車は、二酸化炭素を出さない。
qs.en: Cars that use hydrogen as fuel don't emit carbon dioxide.
qs.e: 水素 = hydrogen (H). 酸素 = oxygen (O). 炭素 = carbon (C). 窒素 = nitrogen (N).

qs.s: 「水素」の意味は？
qs.e: 水素 is the element hydrogen (水素エネルギー = hydrogen energy). Note 酸素 = oxygen, 炭素 = carbon.

m: anyhow; at any rate; in any case; setting that aside

ex.jp: ともかく、まず話を聞いてみよう。
ex.en: In any case, let's first hear them out.

qs.s: 結果は＿＿＿＿として、挑戦したこと自体に意味がある。
qs.en: Setting the result aside, there's meaning in having taken on the challenge itself.
qs.e: ともかく = anyhow/at any rate; (〜はともかく) 'setting ~ aside.' もしかして = maybe/by any chance. かえって = on the contrary/rather. あいにく = unfortunately/inconveniently.

qs.s: 「ともかく」の意味は？
o: anyhow; at any rate; setting that aside
qs.e: ともかく sets an issue aside to move on ('anyway, regardless') — 冗談はともかく = joking aside; ともかくやってみよう = let's just try it anyway.

ex.jp: これほどの大雪は稀だ。
ex.en: Heavy snow like this is rare.

qs.s: 彼ほどの才能の持ち主は、＿＿＿＿な存在だ。
qs.en: Someone with as much talent as him is a rare presence.
qs.e: 稀(まれ) = rare/seldom occurring. 豊富 = abundant/plentiful. 平凡 = ordinary/commonplace. 頻繁 = frequent (the opposite of rare).

qs.s: 「稀」の意味は？
qs.e: 稀 means seldom occurring (稀に = rarely, 稀な例 = a rare case). Opposite of 頻繁 (frequent). Often written まれ in kana.

ex.jp: 雨で地面がぬかるんでいる。
ex.en: The ground is muddy from the rain.

qs.s: つまずいて、＿＿＿＿に手をついてしまった。
qs.en: I tripped and put my hands on the ground.
qs.e: 地面 = the ground/earth's surface (outdoors). 床(ゆか) = the floor (indoors). 壁 = a wall. 天井 = the ceiling.

qs.s: 「地面」の意味は？
qs.e: 地面 is the outdoor ground/surface of the earth (地面に座る = sit on the ground). For an indoor floor, use 床.

m: lifespan; life expectancy; service life (of a thing)

ex.jp: 日本人の平均寿命は世界でも高い。
ex.en: The Japanese average life expectancy is high even worldwide.

qs.s: この電球は＿＿＿＿が長く、十年は持つそうだ。
qs.en: This bulb has a long service life and reportedly lasts ten years.
qs.e: 寿命 = lifespan (of a living thing) or service life (of an object). 年齢 = age (years lived so far). 期限 = a deadline/expiry. 期間 = a span/duration of time.

qs.s: 「寿命」の意味は？
qs.e: 寿命 is how long something lives or lasts (平均寿命 = average lifespan, 電池の寿命 = battery life).

ex.jp: 運動中はこまめに水分をとろう。
ex.en: Take in fluids frequently during exercise.

qs.s: この果物は＿＿＿＿が多く、みずみずしい。
qs.en: This fruit has a lot of moisture and is juicy.
qs.e: 水分 = moisture/water content/fluids. 塩分 = salt content. 糖分 = sugar content. 成分 = a component/ingredient (general).

qs.s: 「水分」の意味は？
qs.e: 水分 refers to the water/moisture in something or fluids to drink (水分補給 = hydration, 水分を取る = stay hydrated).

ex.jp: 受付で身分を証明する書類を見せた。
ex.en: I showed identification documents at the reception.

qs.s: 入場には、運転免許証などの＿＿＿＿証明書が必要だ。
qs.en: For entry, an identification document such as a driver's license is required.
qs.e: 身分 = social status/standing; identity (身分証明書 = ID). 身長 = body height. 資格 = a qualification/credential. 立場 = one's position/standpoint (situation).

qs.s: 「身分」の意味は？
qs.e: 身分 means one's social standing or identity (身分証明書 = ID card, 身分の違い = difference in status).

ex.jp: この習慣は欧米から伝わった。
ex.en: This custom came from the West.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿諸国では、握手が一般的な挨拶だ。
qs.en: In Western countries, a handshake is a common greeting.
qs.e: 欧米 = Europe and America (the West). 東洋 = the East/the Orient (Asia). 南北 = north and south. 各国 = each country/various countries.

qs.s: 「欧米」の意味は？
qs.e: 欧米 combines 欧 (Europe) and 米 (America) to mean 'the West' (欧米化 = Westernization, 欧米人 = Westerners).

m: rationality; reason; logic (usually 合理的 = rational)

ex.jp: その方法は合理的で無駄がない。
ex.en: That method is rational and wastes nothing.

qs.s: 感情ではなく、＿＿＿＿的に判断することが大切だ。
qs.en: It's important to judge rationally rather than emotionally.
qs.e: 合理(的) = rational/logical/reasonable (efficient and sensible). 強引(ごういん) = forcible/pushy. 主観(的) = subjective. 感情(的) = emotional.

qs.s: 「合理（的）」の意味は？
qs.e: 合理 underlies 合理的 (rational) and 合理化 (rationalization/streamlining) — making things logical and efficient. Opposite leaning: 感情的 (emotional).

ex.jp: その国は国王が統治している。
ex.en: That country is ruled by a king.

qs.s: 式典には、隣国の＿＿＿＿夫妻も出席した。
qs.en: The king of the neighboring country and his wife also attended the ceremony.
qs.e: 国王 = a king (male monarch). 女王 = a queen (reigning female monarch). 皇帝 = an emperor. 貴族 = the nobility/aristocrat.

qs.s: 「国王」の意味は？
qs.e: 国王 is a king (国王陛下 = His Majesty the King). 女王 = queen, 皇帝 = emperor (a higher/imperial rank).

m: practical training; hands-on practice; practicum; internship

ex.jp: 看護学生は病院で実習を行う。
ex.en: Nursing students do practical training at the hospital.

qs.s: 教室で理論を学んだ後、工場で＿＿＿＿をする。
qs.en: After learning theory in the classroom, we do hands-on training at the factory.
qs.e: 実習 = hands-on practical training (applying skills in a real setting). 研究 = research. 講義 = a lecture (theory delivered). 練習 = practice/drilling (repetition to master).

qs.s: 「実習」の意味は？
qs.e: 実習 is supervised hands-on practice in a real or simulated work setting (教育実習 = teaching practicum, 実習生 = a trainee/intern). 練習 is repetitive drilling to build a skill.

m: (with neg.) nothing at all; (emphasis) truly; really

ex.jp: なんとも言えない複雑な気持ちだ。
ex.en: It's a complicated feeling I can't quite put into words.

qs.s: 結果がどうなるか、今は＿＿＿＿言えない。
qs.en: I can't say anything at all right now about how it'll turn out.
qs.e: なんとも = (with negative) nothing at all/can't really; also emphatic 'truly.' 必ず = surely/without fail. つい = unintentionally/just (a moment ago). ますます = increasingly.

qs.s: 「なんとも」の意味は？
qs.e: なんとも with a negative means 'not at all / can't really' (なんとも言えない = can't say either way). With positive emphasis it means 'truly' (なんとも美しい = truly beautiful).

ex.jp: 彼女は派手な服装が好きだ。
ex.en: She likes flashy clothing.

qs.s: 会場は＿＿＿＿な照明と音楽で盛り上がっていた。
qs.en: The venue was lively with flashy lighting and music.
qs.e: 派手 = flashy/showy/loud (attention-grabbing). 地味 = plain/subdued (the opposite). 上品 = refined/elegant/classy. 清潔 = clean/hygienic.

qs.s: 「派手」の意味は？
qs.e: 派手 describes something eye-catching and showy (派手な色 = a loud color, 派手に転ぶ = take a spectacular fall). Opposite of 地味.

ex.jp: 年に一度、故郷に帰る。
ex.en: I return to my hometown once a year.

qs.s: 都会で暮らしていると、緑豊かな＿＿＿＿が恋しくなる。
qs.en: Living in the city, I come to miss my green, lush hometown.
qs.e: 故郷(ふるさと) = one's hometown/birthplace (with nostalgic warmth). 都会 = the city/urban area. 他国 = another country/foreign land. 近所 = the neighborhood (nearby area).

qs.s: 「故郷」の意味は？
qs.e: 故郷 is the place one is from, carrying nostalgia (can be read こきょう or ふるさと; 故郷を離れる = leave one's hometown).

ex.jp: てこの原理を使えば重い物も持ち上げられる。
ex.en: Using the principle of the lever, you can lift heavy objects.

qs.s: このエンジンが動く＿＿＿＿を、図を使って説明した。
qs.en: I explained the principle by which this engine works using a diagram.
qs.e: 原理 = a fundamental principle/the underlying mechanism (how/why something works). 原因 = a cause. 原料 = raw material. 原則 = a general rule/principle of conduct (with possible exceptions).

qs.s: 「原理」の意味は？
o: a general rule of conduct (with exceptions)
qs.e: 原理 explains the basic mechanism behind something (動作原理 = operating principle, 原理原則 = first principles). 原則 is more of a guiding rule for behavior.

ex.jp: 彼は高等教育を受けるため都市部へ出た。
ex.en: He moved to the city to receive higher education.

qs.s: イルカは＿＿＿＿な知能を持つ動物として知られている。
qs.en: Dolphins are known as animals with higher intelligence.
qs.e: 高等 = high-grade/higher in a graded scale (高等教育, 高等動物). 下等 = low-grade/inferior (the opposite). 平等 = equality/equal treatment. 均等 = even/uniform distribution.

qs.s: 「高等」の意味は？
qs.e: 高等 marks a higher rank in a graded scale (高等学校 = high school, 高等裁判所 = high court). Opposite of 下等. Distinct from 高級 (luxury) and 高度 (sophisticated).

ex.jp: 来週、大阪へ出張する。
ex.en: Next week I'll go on a business trip to Osaka.

qs.s: 三日間の海外＿＿＿＿で、現地の工場を視察した。
qs.en: On a three-day overseas business trip, I inspected the local factory.
qs.e: 出張 = traveling for work/business. 旅行 = travel/a trip (general, often leisure). 観光 = sightseeing/tourism. 休暇 = a vacation/leave.

qs.s: 「出張」の意味は？
o: business trip; official travel for work
qs.e: 出張 means traveling on business (出張費 = travel expenses, 日帰り出張 = a day business trip).

m: lines; dialogue; one's spoken words (in a play/film)

ex.jp: 俳優が台詞を忘れて、舞台が止まった。
ex.en: The actor forgot his lines, and the play stopped.

qs.s: その映画の名＿＿＿＿は、今でも多くの人に引用される。
qs.en: That movie's famous line is still quoted by many people today.
qs.e: 台詞(せりふ) = an actor's lines/spoken words. 場面 = a scene/situation. 脚本 = the script/screenplay (the whole written work). 字幕 = subtitles/captions.

qs.s: 「台詞」の意味は？
o: lines; dialogue; spoken words in a play/film
qs.e: 台詞 are the words a character speaks (名台詞 = a memorable line, 棒読みの台詞 = lines read flatly). The 脚本 is the whole script.

m: zone; belt; area (with a particular characteristic)

ex.jp: この辺りは工業地帯だ。
ex.en: This area is an industrial zone.

qs.s: 火山の周辺は危険＿＿＿＿として立ち入りが禁止されている。
qs.en: The area around the volcano is off-limits as a danger zone.
qs.e: 地帯 = a zone/belt characterized by something (危険地帯 = danger zone). 地域 = a region/area (general). 地区 = a designated district. 地方 = a region/the provinces (away from the capital).

qs.s: 「地帯」の意味は？
o: zone; belt; area with a particular trait
qs.e: 地帯 marks an area defined by a feature (安全地帯 = safety zone, 緑地帯 = green belt, 山岳地帯 = mountainous region).

m: assuming office; taking up a post; inauguration

ex.jp: 彼は社長に就任した。
ex.en: He assumed the post of company president.

qs.s: 新会長は＿＿＿＿の挨拶で、改革への決意を語った。
qs.en: In his inaugural address, the new chairman spoke of his resolve to reform.
qs.e: 就任 = taking up an official post/office. 退任 = stepping down from a post (the opposite). 就職 = getting a job (becoming employed, general). 在任 = being in office (the period one holds a post).

qs.s: 「就任」の意味は？
o: assuming office; taking up a post; inauguration
qs.e: 就任 means formally taking up a leadership position (就任式 = inauguration ceremony, 大臣に就任 = become a minister). Opposite of 退任.

m: to be conveyed; to be transmitted; to spread; to be passed down

ex.jp: うわさはあっという間に町中に伝わった。
ex.en: The rumor spread through the whole town in no time.

qs.s: 言葉にしなくても、彼の優しさは十分に＿＿＿＿。
qs.en: Even without words, his kindness comes across well enough.
qs.e: 伝わる = (intransitive) to be conveyed/transmitted/passed down on its own. 伝える = (transitive) to convey/tell something. 教わる = to be taught/learn from someone. 変わる = to change.

qs.s: 「伝わる」の意味は？
o: to be conveyed; to be transmitted; to spread; to be passed down
to be taught; to learn from someone
qs.e: 伝わる is the intransitive 'to be transmitted' — feelings, news, traditions, vibrations (気持ちが伝わる = feelings get across, 昔から伝わる = handed down from old). Transitive pair: 伝える.

m: this side (nearer to oneself); just before; one's own standpoint

ex.jp: 駅の一つ手前の駅で降りた。
ex.en: I got off at the station one before the main one.

qs.s: 信号の＿＿＿＿を右に曲がると、すぐ店があります。
qs.en: If you turn right just before the traffic light, the shop is right there.
qs.e: 手前 = the near side / just before a point (closer to the speaker). 向こう = the far side/over there. 奥 = the back/inner part. 隣 = next to/adjacent.

qs.s: 「手前」の意味は？
o: this side (nearer oneself); just before a point
qs.e: 手前 indicates the spot just on this side of something (手前に置く = place it nearer, 一歩手前 = one step short of). Opposite of 向こう/奥.

m: recklessly; excessively; at random; without good reason

ex.jp: やたらに薬を飲むのは体に良くない。
ex.en: Taking medicine excessively is bad for your body.

qs.s: 確かめもせず、＿＿＿＿に物を捨てるべきではない。
qs.en: You shouldn't throw things away recklessly without even checking.
qs.e: やたらに = recklessly/excessively/at random (without judgment). 丁寧に = carefully/politely. 慎重に = cautiously/prudently. 正確に = accurately/precisely.

qs.s: 「やたらに」の意味は？
o: recklessly; excessively; at random; without good reason
qs.e: やたらに (≒やたらと/むやみに) means doing something thoughtlessly or to excess (やたらに高い = unreasonably expensive, やたらと喉が渇く = excessively thirsty).

m: round trip; going and returning; back-and-forth

ex.jp: 家と駅を一日に何度も往復する。
ex.en: I go back and forth between home and the station many times a day.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿の切符を買うと、片道よりお得になる。
qs.en: Buying a round-trip ticket is a better deal than one-way.
qs.e: 往復 = a round trip (going and coming back). 片道 = one way (single direction). 出発 = departure. 到着 = arrival.

qs.s: 「往復」の意味は？
qs.e: 往復 means going and coming back (往復切符 = round-trip ticket, 往復で2時間 = two hours there and back). Opposite of 片道 (one way).

ex.jp: 汗をかいたので着替えを持ってきた。
ex.en: I sweated, so I brought a change of clothes.

qs.s: プールに行くなら、水着と＿＿＿＿を忘れないで。
qs.en: If you're going to the pool, don't forget your swimsuit and a change of clothes.
qs.e: 着替え = a change of clothes / changing clothes. 着物 = a kimono (traditional garment). 荷物 = luggage/baggage. 下着 = underwear.

qs.s: 「着替え」の意味は？
o: a change of clothes; changing clothes
qs.e: 着替え means fresh clothes to change into, or the act of changing (着替える = to change clothes, 着替えを済ませる = finish getting changed).

m: myth; mythology; legend (often figurative: an unfounded belief)

ex.jp: ギリシャ神話には多くの神々が登場する。
ex.en: Many gods appear in Greek mythology.

qs.s: 「安全だ」という＿＿＿＿が、その事故で完全に崩れた。
qs.en: The myth that 'it's safe' completely collapsed with that accident.
qs.e: 神話 = myth/mythology (tales of gods); figuratively an unquestioned but unfounded belief. 伝説 = a legend (about heroes/events). 昔話 = a folk tale/old story. 物語 = a story/narrative (general).

qs.s: 「神話」の意味は？
o: a legend about heroes or events
qs.e: 神話 are myths about gods (日本神話 = Japanese mythology) and figuratively a widely held but baseless belief (安全神話 = the 'safety myth').

m: the whole; overall; general; across the board

ex.jp: この本は科学全般について書かれている。
ex.en: This book is written about science in general.

qs.s: 今年は天候のせいで、農作物＿＿＿＿の出来が悪かった。
qs.en: This year, due to the weather, crops across the board had a poor yield.
qs.e: 全般 = the whole/overall/across the board (covering everything in a domain). 全力 = all one's strength. 全身 = the whole body. The fourth (全力投球) means 'giving it your all,' not relevant here.

qs.s: 「全般」の意味は？
o: the whole; overall; general; across the board
qs.e: 全般 means across an entire field/category (全般的に = generally/overall, 生活全般 = all aspects of life).

ex.jp: 土地の売買には契約書が必要だ。
ex.en: A contract is needed for buying and selling land.

qs.s: インターネットを通じた中古品の＿＿＿＿が活発だ。
qs.en: The buying and selling of used goods via the internet is active.
qs.e: 売買 = buying and selling (both directions). 販売 = selling (the seller's side). 購入 = purchasing (the buyer's side). 取引 = a transaction/dealing (a deal, broader, includes negotiation).

qs.s: 「売買」の意味は？
qs.e: 売買 combines 売る (sell) and 買う (buy) — trade in both directions (売買契約 = a sales contract, 株の売買 = stock trading).

ex.jp: 学校の保健室で休ませてもらった。
ex.en: I was allowed to rest in the school's health room.

qs.s: 地域の＿＿＿＿センターで、無料の健康相談を行っている。
qs.en: The local health center offers free health consultations.
qs.e: 保健(ほけん) = preserving/maintaining health, public health. 保険(ほけん) = insurance (same reading!). 保証 = a guarantee/warranty. 保存 = preservation/saving (keeping something).

qs.s: 「保健」の意味は？
qs.e: 保健 means maintaining health (保健室 = school nurse's office, 保健所 = public health center). Beware the homophone 保険 (insurance) — different kanji, same reading.

m: to stand out; to be conspicuous; to be noticeable

ex.jp: 赤い服は遠くからでも目立つ。
ex.en: Red clothes stand out even from far away.

qs.s: 最近、彼の作品には進歩が＿＿＿＿ようになった。
qs.en: Lately, progress has become noticeable in his work.
qs.e: 目立つ = to stand out/be conspicuous. 隠れる = to hide/be hidden. 薄れる = to fade/grow faint. 劣る = to be inferior to.

qs.s: 「目立つ」の意味は？
o: to stand out; to be conspicuous; to be noticeable
qs.e: 目立つ means to catch the eye/be prominent (目立つ存在 = a standout presence, 目立たない = inconspicuous).

ex.jp: 学校では年間を通して様々な行事がある。
ex.en: The school has various events throughout the year.

qs.s: 運動会は、この町の秋の恒例＿＿＿＿になっている。
qs.en: The sports day has become this town's customary autumn event.
qs.e: 行事 = a scheduled event/function/observance (often communal or annual). 行動 = action/behavior/conduct. 用事 = an errand/personal business to attend to. 催促 = urging/pressing someone (a demand).

qs.s: 「行事」の意味は？
qs.e: 行事 is an organized event on a calendar (年中行事 = annual events, 学校行事 = school events).

ex.jp: 宇宙では重力がほとんど働かない。
ex.en: In space, gravity hardly acts.

qs.s: リンゴが落ちるのは、地球の＿＿＿＿に引かれるからだ。
qs.en: An apple falls because it is pulled by the earth's gravity.
qs.e: 重力 = gravity (the force pulling objects toward the earth). 引力 = attractive force/gravitation between bodies (broader). 圧力 = pressure. 気力 = willpower/energy/spirit.

qs.s: 「重力」の意味は？
qs.e: 重力 is the force of gravity (無重力 = zero gravity, 重力に逆らう = defy gravity). 引力 is the more general attractive force (万有引力 = universal gravitation).
